column8: Review
column11: Message Original

column8:
Place for weekend enjoyment for whole family especially for kids. The mall building interiors are with unique touch and stunning stairs or elevators, with terrace-like structures hosting cafes where you can sip on coffee while enjoying a view of the entire mall—definitely a unique touch.
What sets this mall apart is its indoor thrill rides and amusement park, something I’ve never seen in any other mall. The food court offers a variety of delicious options.
Conveniently located opposite Konanakunte Cross Metro Station, it’s a spacious, modern destination with a relaxed atmosphere, perfect for families or casual outings. The wide selection of national and international brands, along with great dining and entertainment options, make it an all-around fantastic.

column8:
Prestige Forum Mall is one of the best shopping and lifestyle destinations in Bengaluru. The mall offers a great mix of premium and popular brands, making it suitable for all kinds of shoppers. From fashion and electronics to home décor, you can find almost everything under one roof.

The food court and restaurants are a major highlight, with a wide variety of cuisines to choose from—perfect for both quick bites and relaxed dining. The ambiance is modern, clean, and well-maintained, and the overall layout makes it easy to navigate even during busy hours.

Parking is well-organized, and security is managed efficiently, which adds to the overall convenience. The mall also hosts events and seasonal decorations that enhance the experience.

Overall, Prestige Forum Mall is a great place to shop, eat, and spend quality time with friends and family. Highly recommended for a complete weekend outing!

Forum Mall in South Bengaluru is one of the best shopping and entertainment destinations in the city. The mall is spacious, clean, and well organized, with a great mix of national and international brands for fashion, electronics, and lifestyle products. It’s perfect for a day of shopping with family or friends.

The food court has a wide variety of options, from quick bites to full meals, and there are also many cafés and dessert spots to relax and recharge. The ambience is lively, modern, and welcoming, making it a comfortable place to spend time.

The mall also has a good multiplex cinema and fun entertainment zones, so there’s something for everyone, whether you want to shop, eat, or just hang out. Parking is convenient and the staff are helpful, which makes the whole experience smooth and enjoyable. Overall, Forum Mall South is a must-visit destination in Bengaluru for shopping, dining, and entertainment!

column11: One of the best shopping malls in South Bangalore. It's a relatively new mall as it's been functioning for close to 2 years now. You get almost everything in this mall. Your daily needs can be bought at Lulu Daily, clothes, footwear can be bought in many outlets here. On the 3rd floor there is a dedicated gaming place for kids. PVR INOX is located on the 3rd floor and the screens are very good here. The sound system is ultimate. On the 4th floor there is food court, which has many options for almost everyone.

column8:
Forum South Bengaluru is one of the most popular and well-maintained shopping destinations in the southern part of the city.
It offers a modern and vibrant atmosphere that attracts visitors of all age groups.
The mall is spacious, clean, and thoughtfully designed for a comfortable experience.
There is a wide variety of retail stores ranging from premium brands to affordable options.
Fashion lovers can explore numerous clothing, footwear, and accessory outlets.
The mall also has a great selection of electronics and lifestyle stores.
One of the highlights is the excellent food court with diverse cuisines.
Visitors can enjoy everything from fast food to full-course meals.
There are also several fine dining restaurants for a more relaxed experience.
The cinema complex provides a great movie-watching experience with good seating and sound.
The mall is well-lit and has a welcoming ambiance throughout.
Parking facilities are ample and well-organized.
Security measures are strong, ensuring a safe environment for families.
The mall is usually not overly crowded, making it pleasant to walk around.
Cleanliness is maintained consistently across all areas.
Washrooms are neat and well-maintained.
The staff in stores are generally helpful and courteous.
The mall often hosts events and seasonal decorations that enhance its appeal.
It is a great place to spend time with friends and family.
Kids also have options for entertainment and play areas.
Accessibility is good with elevators and escalators conveniently placed.
The layout makes it easy to navigate between floors.
There are plenty of seating areas to relax in between shopping.
The overall vibe is calm compared to some of the busier malls in the city.
It is ideal for both quick visits and long leisure outings.
The mall strikes a good balance between shopping, dining, and entertainment.
Its location in South Bengaluru makes it easily reachable for nearby residents.
Public transport and cab access are fairly convenient.
Overall, Forum South Bengaluru delivers a satisfying and enjoyable mall experience.
It continues to be a preferred destination for shoppers in the area.

column8:
It's a beautiful mall, cleanly maintained, good seating spots and nice interior.
There are many shopping stores ranging from shoes to hats, and with preferences like Max, Lifestyle, and more. Even including cloth stores directly like rare rabbit, Louis philippe, Louis Vuitton, etc.
The washrooms are maintained clean.
The food court was also good with many options like burger king, Macdonald, and many many more.
It even had a fun zone with super to crazy games.
I can go all day with it, the mall was just awesome.
It's was really good, one of the best shopping malls I have seen.
It's not perfect but really good, sad there isn't a option to give 4.5 stars.
I would actually prefer you to go and visit it, because of its beauty and preferences.
